scripts.build: npm run synth:silent && npm run eslint
scripts.eslint: ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 eslint --ext .ts,.tsx --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern src test build-tools
scripts.upgrade: npx npm-check-updates@20 --upgrade --target=minor --peer --no-deprecated --dep=dev,peer,prod,optional --filter=@types/node,esbuild,eslint-import-resolver-typescript,eslint-plugin-import,ts-node,typescript,@aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime,@aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager,@types/aws-lambda,@types/node-fetch,dotenv,node-fetch && yarn install --check-files && yarn upgrade @stylistic/eslint-plugin @types/node @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin @typescript-eslint/parser aws-cdk esbuild eslint-import-resolver-typescript eslint-plugin-import eslint ts-node typescript @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime @aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager @types/aws-lambda @types/node-fetch aws-cdk-lib constructs dotenv node-fetch
